---
title: "essential macro"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# essential macro

## debug

```{julia}
@show sum([1, 2]);
@assert 1 isa Float64 "1 is not in Float64" # return the contraint error
@doc + # return doc of a function 
```

## performance measurement

```{julia}
@time sum(rand(1000)); # return the time and the memory allocation(the times and totally KiB).
@elapsed sum(rand(1000)); # only return the time.
@allocated sum(rand(1000)); # only return the memory allocation(totally bytes).
```

```{julia}
using BenchmarkTools 
@benchmark sum(rand(1000))
```

## performance optimization

```{julia}
A = [1, 2]
@inbounds A[1] # jump the bounds checking.
@simd for i in 1:length(A) # vectorization.
    A[i] += 1
end
@fastmath 1. * 1. # relaxed the precision. 
g(x) = x
@inline f(x) = g(x) + 1 # inline funtion or not.
f(1);
```

## parallelism / multithreading

```{julia}
# multithreading
using Base.Threads
Threads.nthreads() # the number of threads.
@elapsed @threads for i in 1:4
    sleep(1)
end
```

```{julia}
# asynchronous functions
t = @spawn begin
    sleep(2)
    42
end

println("before fetch")
x = fetch(t) # wait util the result has been calculated.
println(x)
```

## scope

```{julia}
@__FILE__ # it works only in julia file insteads of repl.
```
